checks.name: catalog-visualizer-browser-workflow
checks.details: Integrated-browser verification created Inferno, uploaded the hero asset, confirmed visualizer-ready selection, uploaded the customer vehicle image, and generated a persisted preview result with status=complete. The persisted preview metadata also confirmed the result came from deterministic_fallback rather than the HF path.

checks.name: visualizer-space-client-typecheck

checks.name: visualizer-hf-only-unit-tests

checks.name: visualizer-hf-only-lint
checks.details: `pnpm lint` passed after the HF-only visualizer refactor.

checks.name: visualizer-public-hf-space-inference
checks.details: A direct `@gradio/client` call to the public `black-forest-labs/FLUX.2-dev` Space succeeded with the real source vehicle photo plus three Inferno reference images, confirming the new default HF-only backend is callable and returns an edited image result.

checks.name: visualizer-refactor-focused-vitest
checks.details: `pnpm exec vitest run --passWithNoTests tests/vitest/unit/lib/visualizer/actions/process-visualizer-preview.test.ts tests/vitest/unit/lib/integrations/huggingface-config.test.ts tests/vitest/unit/test/api/visualizer-preview-image-route.test.ts tests/vitest/unit/test/api/visualizer-upload-image-route.test.ts` passed with 4 files and 22 tests after removing the dead legacy HF preview adapter, tightening mask audit threading, and correcting stale action-test expectations.

checks.name: visualizer-image-route-boundary-audit
checks.details: Live code audit confirmed app/api visualizer image routes already read through lib/fetchers/visualizer.fetchers.ts and preserve signed Cloudinary-backed delivery behavior; no Prisma reads remain in those routes.

checks.name: visualizer-full-unit-suite
checks.details: `pnpm test` passed with 46 test files and 191 tests after visualizer fetcher centralization and legacy-helper cleanup.

checks.name: visualizer-build-after-boundary-cleanup
checks.details: `pnpm build` passed after removing dead visualizer helper drift, centralizing action reads in fetchers, and updating action test mocks.

checks.name: visualizer-browser-auth-gate
checks.details: Integrated browser reached `/visualizer` and confirmed protected-route auth behavior, but end-to-end preview generation could not be completed because this automation pass could not finish a Clerk-authenticated browser session in the current test browser.
